Status: DONE

What was built:
  Added express-rate-limit middleware to /api/auth/login. Max 5 requests per minute per IP. Returns 429 with Retry-After header on exceed.

  src/routes/auth.ts
  package.json

Verification:
  npm test — 14 passed, 0 failed. Added 4 tests: under limit passes, at limit passes, over limit returns 429, Retry-After header present.
